Bring the PAIN (Questions!)
Say it with me…THE PAIN IS THE PITCH…THE PAIN IS THE PITCH…THE PAIN IS THE
PITCH
Besides believing in the product/service, understanding that the PAIN IS the pitch is the
greatest connection to increase your close rate.
When they say “Sell me this pen?”
The first thing out of a salesperson’s mouth should be a question about what they’ve used to
write with in the past, not something about the fucking pen.
Anyways, here is the question sequence:
1. How long have you been trying to lose weight?
2. How long have you wanted to lose weight?
3. What have you done so far?
a. How did that work for you?
i. Short Term
ii. Long Term
b. Why don’t you think it worked?
i. If good, highlight why it had one of the three pillars (Fitness, Nutrition,
Acc)
ii. If a bad experience, why it had only one or none of the pillars.
c. REPEAT THIS UNTIL ALL QUESTIONS ARE EXHAUSTED
4. Then REITERATE EVERYTHING THEY JUST TOLD YOU
5. Increase the pain: So you’ve been working X hrs/wk for past 18 months and you’ve
gained weight? I’m sure that’s been frustrating. So what do you think has been the
main thing holding you back?
6. NEED THEM TO SAY:
LAZINESS/MOTIVATION/ACCOUNTABILITY/KNOWLEDGE+SUPPORT
7. Once they admit that they are lazy or unmotivated and just need someone to hold
them accountable, the pain sequence is over and you can transition to the pitch.
Transition to Pitch
-Well I think given what you just told me about XYZ, I think you’re going to like this
program/course/offer
-Want to hear about how this program is actually going to work for you?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

PROBLEM PAIN CYCLE :
OVERVIEW OF PAST EXPERIENCES
What have you done ?
What else have you done ?
how long did you do it for ? how long ago ?
how did that work for you ?
big box gym
fitness 	nutrition 	accountability
personal
trainer
categorize : align self with positives repel self from negatives gaps
weight watchers
jenny craig
food based systems
pills shakes
supplement only
work out from
home
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
